events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: insufficient anchor bolt projection on baseplates & anchor bolts, rough-complete stage, reference API RP 686. API RP 686 (API Recommended Practice 686) is the "Recommended Practice for Machinery Installation and Installation Design" which includes requirements for anchor bolt projection, thread engagement, etc. Insufficient anchor bolt projection means the anchor bolts don't have enough thread projection above the baseplate/nut to allow proper nut engagement and tightening. This is non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high (could lead to inadequate anchoring of heavy equipment). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: rough-complete, maybe 80%. Value: 0 (no specific numeric reading given). Confidence high.
